title: Countries around the world are considering teen social media bans – why experts warn it’s a ‘lazy’ fix
summary_full: "I think the argument for a ban is an admission of failure that we cannot regulate companies, so we can only restrict children," one expert told CNBC.
summary_public: "I think the argument for a ban is an admission of failure that we cannot regulate companies, so we can only restrict children," one expert told CNBC.
